title: EDN54 CANCELLED General Overview of the Cannabis Excise Stamps - Canada.ca
content:
## EDN54 CANCELLED General Overview of the Cannabis Excise Stamps

## This publication was cancelled
This publication was cancelled as of 2025-03-19 and replaced by Memorandum EDM6-1, General information on the possession, sale, and distribution of cannabis products and the cannabis stamping regime .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
